title: LEGO Star Wars 75422 SMART Play: Yoda's Hut and Jedi Training - Compatible Interactive Toy Set incl. 2 SMART Tags and 2 Minifigures - Gift Idea for 8+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play Compatible set features Yoda's Hut with a removable roof, bed and cooking area with a fire brick, Jedi training platform, plus 2 SMART Tags, 2 SMART Minifigures and an R2-D2 figure

THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When connected to one of the SMART Tags, a LEGO SMART Brick (not included) powers up the fireplace with mixing and slurping sounds, and the training area with lights and sounds including 'balancing the Force'

2 LEGO SMART STAR WARS MINIFIGURES – Bring SMART Luke Skywalker with a Lightsaber and SMART Yoda to life with a SMART Brick (not included) for responsive play by revealing their unique voices and reactions

HOW TO ACTIVATE YOUR SET – A LEGO SMART Brick from an All-in-One set 75421, 75423 or 75427 (sold separately) is required to enable immersive play functions (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)

SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate iconic scenes: role-play cooking a meal on the stove for Yoda and help Luke Skywalker learn the ways of balancing the Force with crates and even the R2-D2 droid figure
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this interactive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 8+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors
DIGITAL INSTRUCTIONS – The LEGO Builder app guides your child on an intuitive adventure that lets them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, as well as save and track their progress
description: From the manufacturer Building toy for role play Discover the ways of the Force at Yoda’s hut Eat. Sleep. Train. Repeat… Be transported to Yoda’s home on the remote swamp planet of Dagobah for Jedi training masterclasses with this LEGO Star Wars SMART Play Compatible Set for kids.
